details.description: Production generated-files release 1e8c59b with list authentication and native visual hierarchy working, but direct download navigation failing JWT authentication.

change_summary.expected_result: Generated Files lists current-user deliverables and downloads each file through an authenticated Blob request without leaving the conversation page.
functions: Reuse the generated-files JWT helper for both list and download requests
Fetch download bytes with Authorization instead of direct anchor navigation
Create a temporary Blob URL with the original filename and revoke it after use
Make the browser fixture reject unauthenticated download requests and record the downloaded filename
limitations: This release does not change file ownership, retention, discovery, or server download routes
Download failures keep the user on the current page and expose a retry title on the download control
change_summary.reason: Authenticated vip998 acceptance proved the generated list and styling were correct, but clicking the file link navigated to the protected route without a bearer token and returned No auth token.
change_summary.risk: Narrow Client download behavior change. The API query and route are unchanged; deployment remains versioned, recreates only LibreChat-API, and preserves the prior release as the rollback target.

details.command: Restore the timestamp-matched /opt/librechat/backups/generated-files-tab-*/compose.override.yaml created by this deployment, recreate only LibreChat-API, then verify /, /api/config, /office/, Generated Files list loading, and the native Uploads tab.

validation_plan.expected: List and download authentication markers, API ownership rules, and Client release checks pass.
The fixture rejects missing JWT headers and records the original filename after Blob download.

validation_plan.command: Authenticated vip998 My Files acceptance without a model request
validation_plan.expected: One generated PPTX is listed, uploaded inputs are excluded, search works, authenticated download succeeds, and Uploads restores.
